text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: STANDALONE class — does not inherit Cell.\nSrc: src/Spheroid.cpp (moved from src/Cells/)\nHdr: includes/Spheroid.hpp

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stores vector~Spheroid~ directly.
costOfPerturb() and getSynthPerturbedCells()
no longer take unused Cell& parameter.
gradientDescent() removed (was commented out).

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Defined in ConfigTypes.hpp:246.\nNOT in Cell.hpp (which is now deprecated).

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: cell field is SpheroidConfig* (not abstract CellConfig*).\nCellConfig abstract base remains in ConfigTypes.hpp\nbut is vestigial — only SpheroidConfig is used.
